claims.summary: A compact fallback should preserve shape and friction rather than flatten difficult material into generic brevity.
claims.disposition: verify the compact-not-flat contract and texture-aware clarity rule

claims.summary: The forced 4B fallback may have a capacity boundary that changes texture even when the written contract is correct.
claims.disposition: route a matched, offline capacity and texture comparison using fixed prompts and no live provider change

claims.summary: Pressure, packing, friction, and Shadow anchors should remain explicit in fallback diagnostics.
claims.disposition: verify the multi-variable mapping and source-linked contract anchors

claims.summary: Changing the routed model or hard fallback mappings changes live dialogue behavior.
